description:
Hi team,

Sam here. My Dell laptop won't boot — it powers on, shows the Dell logo, then drops to a black screen. Tried holding the power button to reset, no luck. Need this for accessing my account. Happy to drop it by the office.

Thanks,
Sam
short_description: Dell laptop won't boot — black screen after logo

description:
Hi team,

Sam here. The Tahoe MDT (mobile data terminal) screen is flickering badly when mounted in the vehicle — comes and goes over bumps. Looks like a loose display connector. Can someone take a look?

Thanks,
Sam

Hi team,

Sam here. The office printer is showing offline and won't pick up any of my print jobs. Other staff seem to be able to print. Tried restarting it once already.

Thanks,
Sam

Hi team,

Sam here. I'm locked out of my account after too many failed login attempts. Can you reset my password so I can get back in? Thanks for the quick help.

Thanks,
Sam
short_description: Password reset for account — locked out

description:
Hi team,

Sam here. I need the VPN client installed on my Dell laptop so I can connect remotely from the studio. Not sure which version to use — please advise or push it down.

Thanks,
Sam
short_description: VPN client install on Dell laptop

description:
Hi team,

Sam here. The battery on my Dell laptop barely holds a charge anymore — maybe 20 minutes off the cord. Can it be replaced or swapped out?

Thanks,
Sam

Hi team,

Sam here. My laptop won't connect to the office Wi-Fi — it sees the network but fails to authenticate. Wired connection works fine. Can you check my network profile?

Thanks,
Sam

Hi team,

Sam here. The docking station at my desk isn't detecting the external monitor anymore. Tried a different cable and reseating the laptop. Monitor works direct.

Thanks,
Sam
short_description: Docking station not detecting external monitor

description:
Hi team,

Sam here. Outlook keeps prompting me for my password over and over and won't stay signed in on the laptop. Webmail works fine. Can you help reset the mail profile?

Thanks,
Sam

Hi team,

Sam here. The MDT mount in the Tahoe is loose and the terminal keeps shifting while driving. Could use a re-secure or a new bracket.

Thanks,
Sam

Hi team,

Sam here. My laptop is running extremely hot and the fan is loud constantly, then it shuts down. Probably needs the vents cleaned or thermal service.

Thanks,
Sam

Hi team,

Sam here. I need my account permissions updated so I can access the shared drive folder. I'm getting access denied. Can you grant read access?

Thanks,
Sam
short_description: Shared drive access denied — need permission

description:
Hi team,

Sam here. The keyboard on my Dell laptop has a few keys that stick or don't register — the E and spacebar especially. Can it be replaced?

Thanks,
Sam

Hi team,

Sam here. The printer driver on my laptop seems out of date — print jobs come out garbled. Can you reinstall or update the driver?

Thanks,
Sam

Hi team,

Sam here. The Tahoe MDT won't power on at all this morning — no lights, nothing. Checked the cable to the vehicle. Need it working for my shift.

Thanks,
Sam
